name: Dragon's Rage

card_text: When you stun one or more enemy units, buff a friendly unit. (If it doesn't have a buff, it gets a +1 :rb_might: buff.)

name: Zenith Blade
card_text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Stun an enemy unit at a battlefield. You may move a friendly unit to that enemy unit's battlefield. (A stunned unit doesn't deal combat damage this turn.)
